mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM class_info
AND (class_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR class_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR major LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO class_info (class_no, class_name, major, grade, teacher, student_count, classroom) VALUES (#{classNo}, #{className}, #{major}, #{grade}, #{teacher}, #{studentCount}, #{classroom})
mapper.update: UPDATE class_info SET class_no = #{classNo}, class_name = #{className}, major = #{major}, grade = #{grade}, teacher = #{teacher}, student_count = #{studentCount}, classroom = #{classroom} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM class_info
AND (class_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR class_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR major LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
